name: Stack

unions.name: Stack
unions.comment: A Stack containing items of type `a`.

values.name: pop
values.comment:
Pops an item from the Stack.

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.pop
      -- == (Just 1, Stack.empty)
values.type: Stack a -> ( Maybe a, Stack a )

values.name: push
values.comment:
Pushes an item into the Stack.

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.toList
      -- == [1]

values.name: toList
values.comment:
Converts a Stack into a List

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.push 2
    |> Stack.toList
      -- == [2, 1]

values.name: top
values.comment:
Gets the top of the Stack.

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.top
      -- == Just 1

name: Queue

unions.name: Queue
unions.comment: A Queue containing items of type `a`.

values.name: deq
values.comment:
Dequeues an item from the Queue.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.deq
      -- == (Just 1, Queue.empty)
values.type: Queue a -> ( Maybe a, Queue a )

values.name: enq
values.comment:
Enqueues an item to the Queue.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.toList
      -- == [1]

values.name: first
values.comment:
Gets first item of Queue.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.first
      -- == Just 1

values.name: toList
values.comment:
Converts a Queue into a List.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.enq 2
    |> Queue.toList
      -- == [1, 2]
